'''鈭歴-dh-v''' ('''sadhava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:historicize|historicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:historicize|historicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-dh-v
|-
! Lemma
| sadhava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sadhavithi|sadhavithi]] || [[word:sadhaviji|sadhaviji]] || [[word:sadhavishi|sadhavishi]] || [[word:sadhavi|sadhavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhavuthuth|sadhavuthuth]] || [[word:sadhavujuj|sadhavujuj]] || [[word:sadhavushush|sadhavushush]] || [[word:sadhav|sadhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhavuthu|sadhavuthu]] || [[word:sadhavuju|sadhavuju]] || [[word:sadhavushu|sadhavushu]] || [[word:sadhavu|sadhavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhavufuth|sadhavufuth]] || [[word:sadhavufuj|sadhavufuj]] || [[word:sadhavufush|sadhavufush]] || [[word:sadhavuf|sadhavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sadhavethe|sadhavethe]] || [[word:sadhaveje|sadhaveje]] || [[word:sadhaveshe|sadhaveshe]] || [[word:sadhave|sadhave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhavothoth|sadhavothoth]] || [[word:sadhavojoj|sadhavojoj]] || [[word:sadhavoshosh|sadhavoshosh]] || [[word:sadhav|sadhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhavotho|sadhavotho]] || [[word:sadhavojo|sadhavojo]] || [[word:sadhavosho|sadhavosho]] || [[word:sadhavo|sadhavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhavofoth|sadhavofoth]] || [[word:sadhavofoj|sadhavofoj]] || [[word:sadhavofosh|sadhavofosh]] || [[word:sadhavof|sadhavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sadhav忙th忙|sadhav忙th忙]] || [[word:sadhav忙j忙|sadhav忙j忙]] || [[word:sadhav忙sh忙|sadhav忙sh忙]] || [[word:sadhav忙|sadhav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhavathath|sadhavathath]] || [[word:sadhavajaj|sadhavajaj]] || [[word:sadhavashash|sadhavashash]] || [[word:sadhav|sadhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhavatha|sadhavatha]] || [[word:sadhavaja|sadhavaja]] || [[word:sadhavasha|sadhavasha]] || [[word:sadhava|sadhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhavafath|sadhavafath]] || [[word:sadhavafaj|sadhavafaj]] || [[word:sadhavafash|sadhavafash]] || [[word:sadhavaf|sadhavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sadhavasha|sadhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosadhavasha|gosadhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisadhavasha|gokisadhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sadhavn眉sha|sadhavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosadhavnkn眉sha|gosadhavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisadhavn眉sha|gokisadhavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sadhavsh毛sha|sadhavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosadhavnksh毛sha|gosadhavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisadhavsh毛sha|gokisadhavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadhavrosha|sadhavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadhavnkrosha|gosadhavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadhavrosha|gokisadhavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sadhavmusha|sadhavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadhavnkmusha|gosadhavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadhavmusha|gokisadhavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sadhavsherasha|sadhavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosadhavnksherasha|gosadhavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisadhavsherasha|gokisadhavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sadhavngasha|sadhavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosadhavnkngasha|gosadhavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisadhavngasha|gokisadhavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sadhavyasha|sadhavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosadhavnkyasha|gosadhavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisadhavyasha|gokisadhavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sadhavyamasha|sadhavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosadhavnkyamasha|gosadhavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisadhavyamasha|gokisadhavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sadhavn眉sh毛sha|sadhavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosadhavnkn眉sh毛sha|gosadhavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisadhavn眉sh毛sha|gokisadhavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadhavn眉rosha|sadhavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadhavnkn眉rosha|gosadhavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadhavn眉rosha|gokisadhavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadhavn眉musha|sadhavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadhavnkn眉musha|gosadhavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadhavn眉musha|gokisadhavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sadhavsh毛n眉sha|sadhavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosadhavnksh毛n眉sha|gosadhavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisadhavsh毛n眉sha|gokisadhavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadhavsh毛rosha|sadhavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadhavnksh毛rosha|gosadhavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadhavsh毛rosha|gokisadhavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadhavsh毛musha|sadhavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadhavnksh毛musha|gosadhavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadhavsh毛musha|gokisadhavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sadhavron眉sha|sadhavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosadhavnkron眉sha|gosadhavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisadhavron眉sha|gokisadhavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sadhavrosh毛sha|sadhavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosadhavnkrosh毛sha|gosadhavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisadhavrosh毛sha|gokisadhavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sadhavromusha|sadhavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosadhavnkromusha|gosadhavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisadhavromusha|gokisadhavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sadhavmun眉sha|sadhavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosadhavnkmun眉sha|gosadhavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisadhavmun眉sha|gokisadhavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sadhavmush毛sha|sadhavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosadhavnkmush毛sha|gosadhavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisadhavmush毛sha|gokisadhavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sadhavmurosha|sadhavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosadhavnkmurosha|gosadhavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisadhavmurosha|gokisadhavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sadhav|sadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙dh忙v|s忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosadhav|hosadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙dh忙v|hos忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosadhav|hohosadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙dh忙v|hohos忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉sadhav|n眉sadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙dh忙v|n眉s忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sadhav|n眉n眉sadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙dh忙v|n眉n眉s忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂sadhav|n茂sadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙dh忙v|n茂s忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sadhav|n茂n茂sadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙dh忙v|n茂n茂s忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusadhav|lusadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙dh忙v|lus忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusadhav|lulusadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙dh忙v|lulus忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisadhav|lisadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙dh忙v|lis忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisadhav|lilisadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙dh忙v|lilis忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosadhav|kosadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙dh忙v|kos忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosadhav|kokosadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙dh忙v|kokos忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesadhav|kesadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙dh忙v|kes忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesadhav|kekesadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙dh忙v|kekes忙dh忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
